Verdict will update to falsified-by-standard-physics if May drift is <0.1° (likely) per IGRF baseline (data/predictions.json:PRED-073.likely_outcome).

breaking_news_suggestions.headline: Dome Predicts SAA Shift 12× Faster Than All Available Data Show
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: PRED-073 predicts the South Atlantic Anomaly's western cell will drift ≥0.3° westward in a single month. IGRF-13 / CHAOS-7 data shows the actual rate is 0.282°/year — meaning the dome needs ~12× the measured secular variation. The dome's own falsification threshold (<0.1°/month) is triggered by the standard-physics expectation of ~0.024°/month. Verdict window closes 2026-05-31; May CHAOS-7 data arrives early June.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: First prospective prediction with a genuine discriminating threshold that defaults-to-falsified under the consensus null hypothesis. This is not a standard-physics-dressed-as-aether restate — the dome committed a specific number that is quantitatively falsifiable against published data.

bau_triage.note: No open issues with age >= 12h — BAU triage had no candidates (open-issues.json:issues.length=0 with status=open)
